ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income category of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "health_insurance_status" TEXT /* Health insurance status of the individual */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "parent_child_relationship" TEXT /* Parent-child relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "workclass_description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "native_country_description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category */,
  "income_description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Version ID associated with the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
